CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Beth Trittipo, Esq. for Plaintiff: MBH Architects, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Frederick Clayfry was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1---Invoices and Emails -------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Norm Barnes, Jerald G. Schutte, and Nipomo Gateway LLC. as follows:
Damages $68,716.85
Prejudgment Interest $24,364.75
Attorney's Fees $9,672.00
Costs $980.00, for a total of $103,733.60
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated to keeps the Exhibit 1 (copy) in the case file.
